key_points.our_fit_analysis: {"yoe": "JD asks '4+ years customer education, enablement, client success, training, or related'; Jamie ~3 yrs (mild stretch, but 'or related/training' is broad).", "match": "STRETCH — this is a Customer Success / Customer-Education role centered on Gainsight + product-adoption, NOT internal L&D. Jamie's REAL mapping: live facilitation (600+ webinars, personally presenting), end-to-end program logistics, SME-partnered curriculum/facilitator guides, success-metrics/measurement. Closest precedent = Samsara (customer/product-training framed honestly as adjacent).", "honest_gaps_disclosed": "(1) GAINSIGHT — the #1 responsibility area; Jamie has NEVER used it. (2) Customer-success CONTEXT — her facilitation/enablement was internal/program audiences, not external software customers; disclosed honestly in cover. NOT relabeled.", "qa_facilitation_answer_note": "QA_11923742 'Have you personally facilitated live training/webinars — actually presenting, not only building?' = YES. TRUTHFUL: Jamie personally hosts/facilitates live webinars for 600+ participants (resume bullet). The question's core (personally presenting live training) is unambiguously true; the 'customer' nuance (her audiences = program participants/students, not external customers) is disclosed in the cover letter. Not a fabrication."}

fit.yoe: JD asks '4+ years customer education, enablement, client success, training, or related'; Jamie ~3 yrs (mild stretch, but 'or related/training' is broad).
fit.match: STRETCH — this is a Customer Success / Customer-Education role centered on Gainsight + product-adoption, NOT internal L&D. Jamie's REAL mapping: live facilitation (600+ webinars, personally presenting), end-to-end program logistics, SME-partnered curriculum/facilitator guides, success-metrics/measurement. Closest precedent = Samsara (customer/product-training framed honestly as adjacent).
fit.honest_gaps_disclosed: (1) GAINSIGHT — the #1 responsibility area; Jamie has NEVER used it. Disclosed honestly in cover ('I haven't yet worked hands-on in Gainsight, which I'd be eager to ramp on'). NOT claimed in resume (skills list shows CRM=HubSpot, NOT Gainsight). (2) Customer-success CONTEXT — her facilitation/enablement was internal/program audiences, not external software customers; disclosed honestly in cover. NOT relabeled.
fit.qa_facilitation_answer_note: QA_11923742 'Have you personally facilitated live training/webinars — actually presenting, not only building?' = YES. TRUTHFUL: Jamie personally hosts/facilitates live webinars for 600+ participants (resume bullet). The question's core (personally presenting live training) is unambiguously true; the 'customer' nuance (her audiences = program participants/students, not external customers) is disclosed in the cover letter. Not a fabrication.
